title: Booking.com Hotel Scraper Input
description: Search public Booking.com accommodation listings. Defaults are set for a one-night, one-result London test with residential proxy enabled.

destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.description: List of destinations to search, e.g. London, United Kingdom. Start with one destination for a low-cost test.

checkIn.title: Check-in Date
checkIn.description: Future check-in date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Booking.com requires future dates.

checkOut.title: Check-out Date
checkOut.description: Future check-out date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use a one-night range for low-cost tests.

rooms.title: Number of Rooms
rooms.description: Number of rooms to search for.

propertyTypes.title: Property Type Filters
propertyTypes.description: Optional property type filters. Allowed values: Hotels, Apartments, Hostels, Villas, Resorts, B&Bs, Guest houses. Leave empty for all accommodation types.

minReviewScore.title: Minimum Review Score
minReviewScore.description: Only include properties with a guest review score at or above this threshold. Leave 0 for the broadest first test.

maxResults.title: Maximum Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of properties to scrape per destination. Use 1 for the first test; increase only after results look correct.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for scraping. Residential proxy is recommended for reliable Booking.com access.
